reasoning: The HIPAA control 164.308(a)(5)(ii)(C) focuses on log-in monitoring, which can be mapped to Kubernetes by ensuring that authentication failures are logged and monitored. Kubernetes audit logs can capture authentication events, including failures, when properly configured. The API server's audit logging capabilities can be used to track these events, making it possible to monitor and alert on authentication failures.
title: 164_308_a_5_ii_c: 164.308(a)(5)(ii)(C) Log-in monitoring
